name: Subscriptions_Workflow
description: Workflow for processing subscriptions by normalizing email and setting workflow flags.

transitions.name: subscriptions_processing_transition
transitions.description: Orchestrates the subscription processing by invoking process_normalize_email and process_set_workflow_flags.

externalized_processors.name: process_normalize_email
externalized_processors.description: Normalize email by trimming whitespace and converting to lowercase.

externalized_processors.name: process_set_workflow_flags
externalized_processors.description: Set workflowProcessed flag and workflowProcessedAt timestamp.

externalized_processors.name: process_subscriptions
externalized_processors.description: Orchestrates the entire subscription processing workflow.
